author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev. Peer-2-Peer Engineer and Researcher @protocollabs: @mineFilecoin @libp2p @ipld | P2P http://M.Sc. Lecturer at @istecnico. Made @lxjs & @startupscholars
author.name: David Dias

content.text: I get a lot of questions of how the IPFS is capable to provide a content addressing. Fun fact is that IPFS core is small, most of the heavy lifting happens on its networking stack, @libp2p. Today, I want to share an overview with y’all on why it exists and why it is so important.
content.html: I get a lot of questions of how the IPFS is capable to provide a content addressing. Fun fact is that IPFS core is small, most of the heavy lifting happens on its networking stack, @libp2p. Today, I want to share an overview with y’all on why it exists and why it is so important.
